ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the election was held */,
  "office" INTEGER /* Office being contested (e.g., Governor, Senator) */,
  "jurisdiction" INTEGER /* Jurisdiction of the election (e.g., State, County) */,
  "election_type" INTEGER /* Type of election (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "percentage_threshold" REAL /* Percentage threshold for a candidate to win (e.g., 50% + 1 vote) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* The exact date the election was held */,
  "registration_deadline" TEXT /* The deadline for voter registration */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* The percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  "election_cost" REAL /* The estimated cost of conducting the election */,
  "special_notes" TEXT /* Any special notes or remarks about the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_jurisdiction FOREIGN KEY ("jurisdiction") REFERENCES jurisdictions ("jurisdiction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_office FOREIGN KEY ("office") REFERENCES offices ("office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_election_type FOREIGN KEY ("election_type") REFERENCES election_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_affiliation" INTEGER /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the candidate */,
  "education" TEXT /* Highest level of education attained by the candidate */,
  "political_experience" TEXT /* A brief summary of the candidate's political experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_affiliation FOREIGN KEY ("party_affiliation") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "loser_id" INTEGER /* ID of the losing candidate */,
  "winner_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the winner */,
  "loser_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the loser */,
  "winner_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the winner */,
  "loser_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the loser */,
  "total_ballots_cast" INTEGER /* The total number of ballots cast in the election */,
  "invalid_ballots" INTEGER /* The number of invalid or spoiled ballots */,
  "valid_ballots" INTEGER /* The number of valid ballots */,
  "runoff_election" INTEGER /* A flag indicating if a runoff election was required */,
  "runoff_winner_id" INTEGER /* The ID of the winner in the runoff election (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_runoff_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("runoff_winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_loser_id FOREIGN KEY ("loser_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Full name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party and its political ideology */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* The year the party was founded */,
  "current_leader" TEXT /* The current leader of the party */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* The location of the party's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* The official website of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office (e.g., Governor, Senator) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office and its responsibilities */,
  "term_length" INTEGER /* The length of the term for the office */,
  "next_election_year" INTEGER /* The year of the next election for the office */,
  "incumbent" TEXT /* The current incumbent of the office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jurisdictions" (
  "jurisdiction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jurisdiction */,
  "jurisdiction_name" TEXT /* Name of the jurisdiction (e.g., State, County) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the jurisdiction and its boundaries */,
  "population" INTEGER /* The population of the jurisdiction */,
  "voter_registration_rate" REAL /* The percentage of eligible voters who are registered to vote */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* The geographical area of the jurisdiction */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* The capital city of the jurisdiction (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jurisdiction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type (e.g., General, Primary) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type and its significance */,
  "frequency" INTEGER /* The frequency of the election type (e.g., every 2 years) */,
  "eligible_voters" INTEGER /* The number of eligible voters for this type of election */,
  "voting_method" TEXT /* The method used for voting (e.g., mail-in, in-person) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* The date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The current status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* The duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
